---
format: revealjs
---

## Today's Agenda {background-image="libs/Images/background-worldmap4.png" .center}

```{r}
# background-size="1920px 1080px"
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

<br>

<br>

**Writing Workshop**

<br>

<br>

::: r-stack
Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2024)
:::

::: notes
Prep for Class

1. ...
:::


## Paper 1 {background-image="libs/Images/background-worldmap4.png" .center}

<br>

Find an international political event that you find interesting and would like to explore more deeply. 

Your first paper must make an argument that it is important we understand why this event happened.

::: notes

Paper is due today!

<br>

### Any final questions on the assignment?

<br>

**SLIDE**: The rubric...
:::



## Convincing arguments... {background-image="libs/Images/background-worldmap4.png" .center}

<br>

- **Logical**: Do the premises support the conclusion?

- **Clear**: Is the paper easy to read and understand?

- **Credible**: Is there enough high quality evidence (cited using APA)?

- **Critical**: Does the paper address weaknesses in the argument (e.g. logic, evidence, consider counter-arguments)?

::: notes

Keep my writing rubric in mind as you write and revise!

<br>

### Any questions on the rubric?

<br>

**SLIDE**: Before I let you get to work...
:::



## Assignment for Next Class {background-image="libs/Images/background-blue_triangles.jpg" .center}

<br>

1. "Democratic Peace" readings in the syllabus

2. **Before class** submit to our Canvas discussion board:

Generally speaking, do you believe Kant's proposal, or any other international rules, could succeed in preventing most future wars?

::: notes
**Questions?**
:::
